allow: Bash(xargs -0 -I {} sh -c 'rm -rf /tmp/phd-test/* && cp "{}" sample.phd && unzip -o sample.phd > /dev/null && echo "===HEADER===" && cat header.json | head -20 && echo "===OPS COUNT===" && cat operations.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(\\"global:\\", len\(d.get\(\\"global\\",[]\)\), \\"local:\\", len\(d.get\(\\"local\\",[]\)\)\)"')

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/phd-test/current-state.json'\)\); print\('title:', d['global'].get\('title'\)\); print\('links:', len\(d['global'].get\('links', []\)\)\); print\('topics:', d['global'].get\('topics'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('operations.json'\)\); print\('global ops:', len\(d.get\('global', []\)\)\); print\('local ops:', len\(d.get\('local', []\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m={p['name']: p['url'] for p in d}; print\(json.dumps\(m, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); g=d['data']['document']['document']['state']['global']; print\('title:', g.get\('title'\), '| noteType:', g.get\('noteType'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); g=d['data']['document']['document']['state']['global']; print\('title:', g.get\('title'\)\); print\('content len:', len\(g.get\('content'\) or ''\)\); print\('topics:', [t.get\('name'\) for t in g.get\('topics'\) or []]\); print\('noteType:', g.get\('noteType'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); doc=d['data']['document']['document']; print\(f'  name={doc[\\"name\\"]!r}  preferredEditor={doc[\\"preferredEditor\\"]!r}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name'], p['url']\) for p in d if 'eager-hen' in p.get\('url',''\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('docs:', m.get\('totalDocuments'\)\); print\('drive:', m.get\('driveName'\)\); print\('endpoint:', m.get\('endpoint'\)\); print\('folders:', len\(m.get\('folderStructure', []\)\)\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(d['documentType'] for d in m.get\('documents', []\)\); [print\(' ', t, n\) for t,n in c.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; m=json.load\(open\('scripts/legacy/remote-knowledge-vault/id-mapping.json'\)\); print\('mapped entries:', len\(m\)\); print\('sample:'\); [print\(' ', k[:30], '→', v\) for k,v in list\(m.items\(\)\)[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k, ':', v\) for k,v in m.items\(\) if k in \('subgraphs','processors'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('subgraphs:', json.dumps\(m.get\('subgraphs'\), indent=2\)\); print\('processors:', json.dumps\(m.get\('processors'\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('module:', p.get\('module'\)\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(p.get\('exports'\), indent=2\)[:1000]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(p['name'],p['url']\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(bun -e 'const { spawnSync } = require\("node:child_process"\); const r = spawnSync\("switchboard", ["--profile", "vetra-knowledge-vault", "drives", "get", "clean-vault-fix", "--format", "json"], { encoding: "utf-8" }\); console.log\("exit:", r.status\); console.log\("stderr:", \(r.stderr||""\).slice\(0,800\)\);')

Bash(python3 -c "import json; m=json.load\(open\('/home/p/Powerhouse/bai-knowledge-note/scripts/vault-dump-canonical/manifest.json'\)\); types={}; [types.setdefault\(d.get\('documentType','?'\),[]\).append\(d\) for d in m.get\('documents',[]\)]; [print\(f' {t}: {len\(ds\)}'\) for t,ds in sorted\(types.items\(\), key=lambda x:-len\(x[1]\)\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('profile:', d.get\('name'\), 'url:', d.get\('url'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x.get\('name'\), x.get\('id'\), x.get\('slug'\)\) for x in d if isinstance\(d,list\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); nodes=d.get\('document',{}\).get\('state',{}\).get\('global',{}\).get\('nodes',[]\) or d.get\('nodes',[]\); print\('total nodes:', len\(nodes\)\); types={}; [types.setdefault\(n.get\('documentType','folder'\),0\) or types.update\({n.get\('documentType','folder'\):types.get\(n.get\('documentType','folder'\),0\)+1}\) for n in nodes]; [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in sorted\(types.items\(\)\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total nodes:', len\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('knowledgeGraphNodes',[]\)\)\); print\('first 3:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('knowledgeGraphNodes',[]\)[:3]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('reindex:', json.dumps\(d.get\('data'\) or d.get\('errors'\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('debug:', json.dumps\(d.get\('data'\) or d.get\('errors'\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); n=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('knowledgeGraphNodes',[]\); print\('nodes total:', len\(n\)\); print\('mocs:', sum\(1 for x in n if \(x.get\('noteType'\) or ''\).startswith\('MOC \('\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\('debug after nodes:', json.load\(sys.stdin\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4001/graphql/knowledgeGraph -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"query { knowledgeGraphNodes\(driveId: \\"195bf8fd-6610-45b0-9427-51f2c7154414\\"\) { documentId noteType } }"}')
